programs.title: University Challenge
programs.desc: The University of Bristol plays Durham University in the first match of the series, with a place in the second round at stake. Jeremy Paxman asks the questions.

programs.title: Only Connect
programs.desc: Quiz show presented by Victoria Coren in which patience and lateral thinking are as vital as knowledge, and connections need to be made between apparently unconnected things.

programs.title: Lost Cities of the Ancients
programs.desc: Documentary series which unearths lost civilisations and cities. This edition visits northern Peru to find the ruins of 250 mysterious pyramids.

programs.title: Da Vinci: The Lost Treasure
programs.desc: Fiona Bruce uncovers the story of Leonardo da Vinci. She travels to Florence, Milan, Paris, Warsaw and to New York, where she is given an exclusive preview of a new Leonardo.

programs.title: British Art at War: Bomberg, Sickert and Nash
programs.desc: Andrew Graham-Dixon tells the story of artist Walter Sickert, who understood that the theatre of war was not confined to the trenches.
